Description_Specification: Encounter for other specified prophylactic measures (Systemic Vector-Prophylaxis)
Regulatory_Justification: Required for patient chart classification in high-burden zones

Description_Specification: Column chromatography/mass spectrometry (Liquid chromatography-tandem mass spectrometry for sweat monomer clearance)
Regulatory_Justification: Tracks compliance and sweat partition coefficients

Description_Specification: Outpatient physician evaluation and management visit (15-29 minutes)
Regulatory_Justification: Standard monitoring for Expanded Access cohort assessment

Description_Specification: Patient education, non-physician provider, typically multidisciplinary (Vector avoidance compliance training)
Regulatory_Justification: Covers institutional overhead for field deployment instruction

Description_Specification: Oral Systemic Botanical Monomer (150mg capsule, 30-count bottle)
Regulatory_Justification: Standard product tracking identifier for pharmacies

Description_Specification: Individual Patient Expanded Access Investigational New Drug Application
Regulatory_Justification: Required to release stock for non-prophylactic emergency bites
